name: Texas Barbecue
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Roast beef or round steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients (except meat) in a bowl and stir until well mixed.
2. Cut the meat into bite-sized cubes.
3. Add the meat cubes to the sauce mixture.
4. Place the meat and sauce combination in a crock-pot on low setting.
5. Cook for 6-8 hours with the lid closed.
6. For a thicker consistency, keep the lid closed for an additional 4 hours, then remove the lid for 2 hours before serving.
